allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add badge card input textarea select label --yes)

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('git'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twitter'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('x'\)\).sort\(\); console.log\(icons.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\)\).sort\(\); console.log\(icons.slice\(0, 50\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Total icons:', Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && !k.startsWith\('use'\)\).length\)")
